narrative_beat: Wide split simetrico: esquerda figura ajoelhada em ruina com calendario rasgado, direita figura em pe com Biblia aberta sob luz dourada

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a symmetrical split composition: left side a kneeling figure in ruined clothes hunched over a torn calendar with crossed-out dates on the floor; right side a standing figure holding an open Bible, illuminated from above by golden divine light
subject.focal_point: the contrast between defeated kneeling figure (left) and vigilant standing figure (right)
subject.secondary: torn calendar pages scattered on left, open golden Bible pages on right

environment.location: abstract dark stage with mirrored symmetry
environment.atmosphere: moral contrast between manipulation and obedience

composition.rule: vertical center split, two figures mirrored
composition.foreground: kneeling figure (left, crimson-dim) and standing figure (right, amber-gold)
composition.background: desaturated grayscale transitional space blending both sides

lighting.key_light: dim crimson-red from above-left on kneeling figure, golden warm beam from above-right on standing figure
lighting.rim_light: crimson rim on left figure, gold rim on right figure
lighting.shadow_quality: deep shadows on both sides, split symmetry

style.post_processing: halation on gold beam, crushed blacks, heavy grain, dual-tone (crimson left / amber-gold right)
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, paper fibers on torn calendar, leather on Bible, dust particles

symbolism.primary: two types of Christians: manipulated by men vs obedient to Jesus

negative_as_positive: clean frame without text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
dual-tone palette: crimson left side, amber-gold right side

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: O primeiro e manipulado por um homem. O segundo esta obedecendo ao proprio Jesus.
